name: utopia-php/circuit-breaker
description: Light & simple Circuit Breaker for PHP to prevent cascading failures in distributed systems.

suggest.utopia-php/telemetry: Required when passing telemetry adapters or running the local telemetry demo.
suggest.ext-opentelemetry: Required by utopia-php/telemetry when using OpenTelemetry metrics.
suggest.ext-protobuf: Required by utopia-php/telemetry when using OpenTelemetry metrics.
suggest.ext-redis: Required when using Utopia\CircuitBreaker\Adapter\Redis with the phpredis extension.

scripts.test:e2e:docker: sh -c 'docker compose -p breaker-e2e -f docker-compose.yml up --build --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from php; status=$?; docker compose -p breaker-e2e -f docker-compose.yml down -v --remove-orphans; exit $status'
telemetry:scenario: docker compose -p breaker-telemetry -f docker-compose.telemetry.yml exec -T demo php examples/telemetry/scenario.php
